headline: Jim Cramer on Dell: “I Missed One of the Greatest Stories Ever Told”
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation. Cramer highlighted the missed opportunities in the stock. He stated: Oh, then there’s two that I’m really embarrassed and even mortified to talk about: AMD and Dell. With AMD, the […]

headline: Jim Cramer Considers AMD Stock’s Dip as a Buying Opportunity
summary: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation.
